positive_prompt:
SINGLE isolated stone-age object, centered composition, object fills 70% of frame, empty bare dirt background, no surrounding props, no fences or walls, orthographic 3/4 view with slight overhead angle, pixel art, crisp pixels, 16-color earthy palette, primitive prehistoric era, clear silhouette, rendered as a standalone game sprite
THREE large dark brown strips of animal hide prominently HANGING VERTICALLY from a simple wooden crossbeam, hide strips are the main visual subject and fill most of the frame, two short vertical posts hold up one horizontal beam, primitive fiber lashings visible at joints, hide strips dominate the composition, stone-age prehistoric food preservation rack, standing on empty dirt ground
negative_prompt: multiple objects, scene with several items, sprite sheet, icon grid, tileable texture, repeating pattern, ground tile, floor tile, fence, wall, courtyard, yard, building interior, map view, RPG asset pack, photo-realistic, 3d render, anti-aliasing, smooth gradients, text, watermark, signature, modern objects, metal, plastic, blurry, low quality, side view elevation, architectural blueprint
notes: v3 재설계. v2는 프레임만 그리고 가죽 스트립 누락. 'THREE large' + 'HANGING VERTICALLY' + 'main visual subject' + 'fill most of the frame'로 가죽에 어텐션 강제.
